Slide 19: Think ABS $11.7 is from local team assumption. May I know how we
come to this number?

On Mon, Apr 7, 2025 at 1:52 PM Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>
wrote:

Thanks Ian and Jianghong, pls see the response below in blue. Will
elaborate more in the meeting.

Slide 7 - 8

   -

   Has this approach been aligned with all parties?

Yes, have aligned with all parties that a) we first focus on resolving key
internal disagreement of the 2 sellers (舰长/超辉煌) with negative feedback and
acknowledgement of benefits from both sides; b) for the rest of accounts,
proceed with accounts with aligned next steps


Regarding 舰长/超辉煌, working closely with CN SMT on addressing seller
feedback, and will re-confirm seller willingness during seller visit W3 of
April.



Slide 15

   -

   Semi-consignment here equals to our FBS right?

Temu semi-consignment 半托管 does not equal FBS. Under Temu semi, Temu is
responsible for product selection, pricing, marketing & ads; sellers are
responsible for warehousing and fulfillment. Shopee FBS on the other hand
is a warehousing and fulfillment service.

   -

   Does it make sense/would we be able to get these sellers into our Local
   FBS as well?

Many of these sellers have their own warehouse in Manila already, so kind
of difficult to onboard FBS. However, for those using 3PFs we are pitching
FBS, and the rest we are pitching VisMin (Regional) FBS.



Slide 19: Think ABS $11.7 is from local team assumption. May I know how we
come to this number?


This is following CNCB new expert intel. We believe their ABS will be
higher than SHP (~$7.0) given the checkout mini spend (P280). Also they are
pushing in-app discount vouchers with P1000 and above mini spend to drive
the ABS


Slide 23

   -

   Should we be concerned that ABS is going down?


The main reason for ABS going down is that CB SCS enjoyed more FS0 during
March. If we compare Apr mtd with March, we can see an obvious increase in
ABS since the platform reduced low FS0 for Apr.

Besides, if compared to Feb, the hot selling product also changed to summer
items which are generally cheaper.
